global_description: A sleek, medium-sized bird with a smooth, streamlined body. It features a soft, silky plumage predominantly in shades of brown and gray, with a distinctive crest on its head. The wings and tail have bright yellow and red accents, and the face is marked with a black mask.

part_details.plumage: Soft, silky feathers in brown and gray, smooth texture.
part_details.head: Crested with a sleek shape, featuring a black mask across the eyes.
part_details.wings: Gray with bright red wax-like tips, smooth and streamlined.
part_details.tail: Gray with a bright yellow tip, slightly squared shape.

spatial_relations: The black mask covers the area around the eyes and extends to the beak.
The crest rises from the top of the head.
The red tips are located on the secondary feathers of the wings.
The yellow tip is at the end of the tail.
